displayTitle: The Clone Wars S01E06: Downfall of a Droid
synopsis: R2-D2 is lost during a fierce space battle - and Anakin, along with Ahsoka and a replacement droid, R3-S6, must find him before the Separatists discover the Jedi military secrets locked in his memory banks.
title: The Clone Wars S01E06: Downfall of a Droid
